tweets.full_text:
I can't believe this is real

I have GLM 5.2 running 100% locally on my Mac Studio. 2 bit quant.

The results I'm getting are better than Opus 4.8

It's now powering my Hermes Agent and Codex. 100% free, local, private super intelligence on my desk

I also have it in a loop https://t.co/44MMm1DNbE
tweets.summary: GLM 5.2模型在Mac Studio本地运行2bit量化，性能超越Opus 4.8，完全免费私密。展示开源大模型本地部署的可行性和性能突破。
angles: GLM 5.2本地运行超越Opus 4.8

开源模型终于能打闭源旗舰

tweets.full_text:
Introducing Brain in Computer.

Brain is a continuously learning memory system. Every task on Computer plugs into a context graph built by Brain.

It makes Computer more stateful with every run.

Available as a research preview for all Perplexity Max subscribers. https://t.co/Dw4Q7Izmqs
tweets.summary: Perplexity推出Brain in Computer功能，一个持续学习的记忆系统，为Computer增加状态性。现作为研究预览版向Perplexity Max订阅者开放。
angles: Perplexity Brain：AI终于有了持续记忆
Computer新能力｜每次运行都更聪明的AI助手
持续学习的AI记忆系统，Perplexity如何做到

tweets.full_text:
As AI takes on longer, higher-stakes tasks, we want models to carry beneficial and safe behavior into new domains beyond their training—and maintain it under pressure.

That’s the idea behind our new research on training models to be broadly and persistently beneficial.
tweets.summary: OpenAI发布新研究：训练AI模型在新领域保持安全有益行为，即使在压力下也能维持。探索AI长期高风险任务的可靠性。
angles: OpenAI新研究：让AI在压力下也能保持安全
AGI时代的可靠性突破：跨域行为迁移
从训练到部署：AI安全性的终极考验
